hit_rate_caveat: 85.2% at n=27 crosses the COUNT threshold but NOT the out-of-sample/multi-regime bar. ~23 of 27 grades resolved in (or right after) the 06-09→06-18 melt-up; 06-19/06-22/06-23 are the first 3 mild down days (KSE-100 -1.36%, -0.25%, -0.44%) but the index is STILL above MA20 (173,918) so the regime has softened but not flipped. ALL 4 MISSES are conviction-5/6 short-horizon RELATIVE/MEAN-REVERSION/NO-TRADE calls: P-011 (Islamic-vs-conv), P-020 (E&P-vs-index), P-021 (index-overbought), P-017 (no-chase basket, MARGINAL +0.15pp = noise). Per-conviction: conv-6+ still very strong. Demonstrated edge = fundamental-floor / magnitude / higher-conviction trend-aligned holds; short-horizon relative/contrarian timing remains a coin-flip.
